metadata.title: Trading Agent Dashboard Architecture Mirror
notes: This manifest documents architecture only. It must not change production logic, research logic, workflow execution, or artifact semantics.
Explicitly uncertain relationships remain marked unverified instead of being inferred into verified flow.

boundaries.label: Browser Surface
boundaries.description: Static GitHub Pages UI rendered by index.html, styles.css, script.js, and shared browser-side helpers.

boundaries.label: GitHub Publication
boundaries.description: Checked-in JSON artifacts and static files served from the repository through GitHub Pages.

boundaries.label: n8n Runtime
boundaries.description: Live orchestration and workflow execution inside the n8n workspace.

boundaries.label: Supabase Runtime
boundaries.description: Canonical runtime storage for market snapshots, agent outputs, and economic events.

boundaries.label: Research Stack
boundaries.description: Downstream-only replay, evaluation, checker, and derived research artifact generation.

items.label: Verified
items.description: Directly supported by current repository files, exports, or runtime artifacts.

items.label: Partially Verified
items.description: High-level component or path is supported, but exact implementation boundaries remain incomplete.

items.label: Unverified
items.description: Called out intentionally as uncertain and left explicit rather than assumed.

items.label: Reads / Consumes
items.description: Downstream component reads data or artifacts produced elsewhere.

items.label: Writes / Publishes
items.description: Component emits a checked-in artifact or runtime table update.

items.label: Triggers
items.description: Execution control path, not a data transformation.

items.label: Browser
items.description: Read-only UI and browser-derived presentation logic.

items.label: Runtime
items.description: Live orchestration, collectors, agents, and runtime data stores.

items.label: Research
items.description: Historical analysis stack that must stay downstream-only.

nodes.label: GitHub Pages
nodes.summary: Serves the static dashboard and checked-in JSON artifacts from the repository root.
nodes.details: Current hosting is GitHub Pages, not Netlify. The dashboard loads index.html, styles.css, script.js, and checked-in data files from the repository.

verification.evidence: docs/CURRENT_STATE.md and README.md identify GitHub Pages as the active host.

nodes.label: Dashboard Renderer
nodes.summary: Renders live production cards and read-only research tabs from published artifacts and Supabase research views.
nodes.details: script.js loads layer1.json, layer2.json, workflow-control.json, workflow-status.json, local research artifacts, and selected research Supabase views. Browser-side Layer 2 confidence is re-derived from Layer 1 headline confidence.

verification.evidence: index.html and script.js define the static UI and data-loading behavior.

nodes.label: Operator Browser
nodes.summary: Receives the rendered dashboard surface and can trigger the orchestrator through the published webhook control contract.
nodes.details: The browser never receives the n8n API key. It works through workflow-control.json and the published status/data artifacts.

verification.evidence: script.js triggers the webhook from workflow-control.json and polls workflow-status.json.

nodes.label: data/workflow-control.json
nodes.summary: Contains the non-secret webhook configuration used by the browser to trigger the Master Orchestrator.
nodes.details: The dashboard uses this checked-in file so the browser can trigger runs without exposing the n8n API key.

verification.evidence: HANDOFF_BRIEF.md and script.js both describe workflow-control.json as the trigger contract.

nodes.label: data/workflow-status.json
nodes.summary: Published run-status artifact consumed by the dashboard for workflow health, steps, and failure reporting.
nodes.details: The latest checked-in runtime artifact shows a successful run on 2026-07-20 with Layer 2 Trade Selection Agent included.

verification.evidence: data/workflow-status.json and exports/master_orchestrator.json show the status payload contract.

nodes.label: data/layer1.json
nodes.summary: Published Layer 1 dashboard artifact containing sealed raw-call presentation data.
nodes.details: Current production cards, expiry presentation, and tooltip contract render from this checked-in artifact.

verification.evidence: dashboard_writer.json writes data/layer1.json and script.js renders it directly.

nodes.label: data/layer2.json
nodes.summary: Published raw Layer 2 pair-selection artifact used as upstream display input.
nodes.details: The browser still re-derives live pair confidence and strength from Layer 1 headline confidence instead of trusting every upstream Layer 2 payload field.

verification.evidence: layer2_trade_selection_agent.json writes data/layer2.json and script.js reads it.
notes: The exact publication responsibility split beyond the verified Layer 2 writer remains explicitly unverified.

nodes.label: Master Orchestrator
nodes.summary: Sequential n8n control workflow that triggers collectors, Layer 1 agents, Layer 2, Dashboard Writer, and status publication.
nodes.details: The current export includes Layer 2 Trade Selection Agent before Dashboard Writer and then builds workflow-status.json.

verification.evidence: exports/master_orchestrator.json and current docs agree on the sequential execution chain.

nodes.label: Workflow Status Builder
nodes.summary: Inline JS inside the Master Orchestrator that assembles the final success or failure payload.
nodes.details: The export contains an inline JS node that enumerates all orchestration step names, builds status objects, and writes the final workflow-status.json payload.

verification.evidence: exports/master_orchestrator.json contains the Build workflow-status JSON node.
notes: Node-level failure fan-out inside each child workflow remains unverified beyond the published step summary.

nodes.label: Eco Events Collector
nodes.summary: Collects economic calendar inputs and writes deduped rows into Supabase economic_events.
nodes.details: The current live issue around duplicate inserts is documented as fixed. It remains part of the orchestrator sequence and future event-risk context.

verification.evidence: Current docs and exports identify the collector and economic_events destination.

nodes.label: Supabase economic_events
nodes.summary: Runtime event-context table fed by Eco Events Collector.
nodes.details: Future or partial downstream consumers of economic_events are not fully verified across every collector and downstream workflow.

verification.evidence: Docs and export references identify economic_events as the collector target.
notes: Which non-BTC collectors directly consume economic_events remains explicitly unverified.

nodes.label: USD Collector
nodes.summary: Collects current USD market context for downstream snapshot use.
nodes.details: Collector-level factor mix differs by asset, but its architectural role is to build usable market context for the matching Layer 1 agent.

verification.evidence: Exports show USD Collector as an orchestrated workflow.

nodes.label: EUR Collector
nodes.summary: Collects current EUR market context for downstream snapshot use.
nodes.details: Collector architecture matches the same collector-to-snapshot role documented in the handoff.

verification.evidence: Exports show EUR Collector as an orchestrated workflow.

nodes.label: Gold Collector
nodes.summary: Collects current Gold/XAU market context for downstream snapshot use.
nodes.details: Gold remains a runtime collector in production and a separately measured asset in research.

verification.evidence: Exports show Gold Collector as an orchestrated workflow.

nodes.label: NQ Collector
nodes.summary: Collects current NQ market context for downstream snapshot use.
nodes.details: NQ runtime collection is distinct from the research-side NQ replay and checker stack.

verification.evidence: Exports show NQ Collector as an orchestrated workflow.

nodes.label: BTC Collector
nodes.summary: Collects current BTC market context for downstream snapshot use.
nodes.details: BTC remains the only covered asset with weekend research handling in the dashboard.

verification.evidence: Exports show BTC Collector as an orchestrated workflow.

nodes.label: Supabase market_snapshots
nodes.summary: Canonical runtime snapshot store populated by collectors and consumed by Layer 1 agents.
nodes.details: High-level table role is well documented, but complete column-level lineage remains outside the current verified Architecture Mirror scope.

verification.evidence: Docs consistently identify market_snapshots as the runtime collector output store.
notes: Complete column-level Supabase runtime and research lineage remains explicitly unverified.

nodes.label: USD Layer 1 Agent
nodes.summary: Sealed raw directional agent for USD.
nodes.details: Layer 1 isolation is a non-negotiable architectural rule. The agent writes raw output to agent_outputs only.

verification.evidence: Exports and docs identify the USD Layer 1 workflow and sealed-agent rule.

nodes.label: EUR Layer 1 Agent
nodes.summary: Sealed raw directional agent for EUR.
nodes.details: Docs still flag a potential JSON parsing brittleness unless confirmed fixed in the live workflow.

verification.evidence: The workflow is verified, but a parser-risk note remains active in repository docs.
notes: Known issue status for object-vs-string JSON parsing remains partially verified.

nodes.label: Gold Layer 1 Agent
nodes.summary: Sealed raw directional agent for Gold/XAU.
nodes.details: Writes raw output to agent_outputs and remains isolated from other Layer 1 outputs.

verification.evidence: Exports and docs identify the workflow and isolation rule.

nodes.label: NQ Layer 1 Agent
nodes.summary: Sealed raw directional agent for NQ.
nodes.details: Writes raw output to agent_outputs and remains isolated from other Layer 1 outputs.

verification.evidence: Exports and docs identify the workflow and isolation rule.

nodes.label: BTC Layer 1 Agent
nodes.summary: Sealed raw directional agent for BTC.
nodes.details: Writes raw output to agent_outputs and remains isolated from other Layer 1 outputs.

verification.evidence: Exports and docs identify the workflow and isolation rule.

nodes.label: Supabase agent_outputs
nodes.summary: Canonical runtime store for Layer 1 outputs and a key upstream source for publication and Layer 2 pair selection.
nodes.details: Dashboard Writer and the current Layer 2 Trade Selection Agent both read from agent_outputs in the verified export set.

verification.evidence: Exports explicitly query agent_outputs.

nodes.label: Layer 2 Trade Selection Agent
nodes.summary: Downstream pair-selection workflow built from Layer 1 outputs.
nodes.details: The verified export reads agent_outputs, builds a pair-trade JSON, and writes data/layer2.json. Browser semantics remain stricter than some upstream payload fields.

verification.evidence: Current export and browser logic both show Layer 2 as downstream of Layer 1 outputs.
notes: README-level event-adjusted descriptions are broader than the current verified export read path.

nodes.label: Dashboard Writer
nodes.summary: Builds the published Layer 1 dashboard artifact from runtime outputs.
nodes.details: The current verified export writes data/layer1.json. Whether it publishes additional dashboard artifacts beyond that verified file remains intentionally unverified.

verification.evidence: dashboard_writer.json writes data/layer1.json through the GitHub node.
notes: Whether Dashboard Writer publishes artifacts beyond data/layer1.json remains explicitly unverified.

nodes.label: Repo Docs and Logic
nodes.summary: Checked-in logic documents, workflow exports, and browser code used to recover architecture and drive downstream replay.
nodes.details: This node represents the repository-side source of truth for project memory, workflow exports, browser code, and research scripts.

verification.evidence: Repository memory and checked-in exports are the documented recovery baseline.

nodes.label: Historical Snapshot Builders
nodes.summary: Build repo-local historical market snapshots for downstream replay.
nodes.details: These builders sit in backtester/ and are part of the downstream historical research stack, not live production runtime.

verification.evidence: Handoff and checked-in builder scripts establish the historical snapshot-builder role.

nodes.label: Historical Replay Runners
nodes.summary: Reconstruct production-style calls over historical windows using the replay stack.
nodes.details: Replay is downstream-only and measures production-style logic rather than replacing it.

verification.evidence: Checked-in replay runners and research philosophy docs define replay as downstream-only.

nodes.label: Outcome Evaluators
nodes.summary: Judge replayed predictions against realized outcomes before checker generation.
nodes.details: Evaluation sits between replay and checker generation in the deterministic research chain.

verification.evidence: Research docs and tests show the evaluation stage, though not every asset-specific evaluator file is summarized in one place.

nodes.label: Checker Artifacts
nodes.summary: Canonical deterministic checker artifacts for USD, EUR, Gold, NQ, and BTC.
nodes.details: These checked-in artifacts are the main downstream source for accuracy tables, weekday breakdowns, pair trade research, Factor Edge Lab, Phase 2 Shadow Backtest, and parts of ADR/L2L research.

verification.evidence: Current checked-in checker artifacts and dashboard code use these as canonical research inputs.

nodes.label: Repo-Local Candle Sources
nodes.summary: Repo-local OANDA and Binance candle coverage used by L2L 1H Sequence Research.
nodes.details: Current repository evidence supports sequence-aware L2L measurement for EUR, Gold, NQ, BTC, and selected Layer 2 pairs. Unsupported paths remain explicitly unavailable.

verification.evidence: Current docs and importer scripts support the repo-local candle-source role.
notes: USD/DXY and unsupported OHLC gaps remain explicitly unavailable rather than inferred.

nodes.label: ADR / L2L Research Artifact
nodes.summary: Checked-in L2L 1H Sequence Research artifact used by the dashboard.
nodes.details: This module answers whether price moved at least the required ADR-based distance using sequence-aware 1H candles and daily ADR20, while keeping unsupported assets explicitly unavailable.

verification.evidence: Current artifact, tests, and dashboard rendering all reference the ADR/L2L research payload.

nodes.label: Factor Edge Lab Artifact
nodes.summary: Checked-in factor-review artifact for Layer 1 and Layer 2 factor evidence.
nodes.details: This tab is read-only and keeps factor-level ADR/L2L opportunity reliability explicitly unavailable where no joinable export exists.

verification.evidence: Current artifact, tests, and dashboard rendering all reference Factor Edge Lab.

nodes.label: Phase 2 Shadow Backtest Artifact
nodes.summary: Checked-in conservative shadow-logic comparison artifact derived downstream from stored evidence.
nodes.details: This artifact compares original logic against evidence-reweighted shadow logic without changing production logic or canonical checker outputs.

verification.evidence: Current artifact, tests, and dashboard rendering all reference Phase 2 Shadow Backtest.

nodes.label: Phase 3 Validation Modules
nodes.summary: Phase 3 validation scripts and reports for selectivity, walk-forward, parity, and stability work.
nodes.details: Phase 3 evidence exists in scripts and docs, but not every module currently publishes a dedicated dashboard artifact.

verification.evidence: Checked-in scripts and reports verify the Phase 3 validation area, but publication paths are not unified into one checked-in artifact.

nodes.label: Research Supabase Views
nodes.summary: Read-only Supabase research views queried directly by the dashboard for selected backtest panels.
nodes.details: script.js queries multiple read-only research views for matrices and infrastructure status. Complete column-level lineage across every derived view remains outside this verified scope.

verification.evidence: script.js contains the live fetchResearchView queries and read-only usage contract.
notes: Complete column-level Supabase research lineage remains explicitly unverified.

edges.label: Serves static dashboard files
edges.details: GitHub Pages serves index.html, script.js, styles.css, and shared browser-side libraries.

verification.evidence: README.md and index.html define the static-site surface.

edges.label: Renders dashboard UI
edges.details: The browser receives the rendered production and research tabs from the static dashboard code.

verification.evidence: index.html and script.js implement the browser UI.

edges.label: Trigger configuration
edges.details: workflow-control.json provides the non-secret webhook contract used by script.js.

verification.evidence: script.js loadWorkflowControl reads workflow-control.json.

edges.label: Run status and failure report
edges.details: workflow-status.json drives workflow summary, step reports, and error reporting.

verification.evidence: script.js loadWorkflowStatus reads workflow-status.json.

edges.label: Layer 1 dashboard payload
edges.details: Published Layer 1 live cards, expiry state, and overview panels render from layer1.json.

verification.evidence: script.js fetches and renders layer1.json.

edges.label: Raw Layer 2 dashboard payload
edges.details: script.js reads layer2.json as upstream input, then applies stricter browser-side pair logic for display semantics.

verification.evidence: script.js fetches layer2.json and applies shared Layer2PairLogic.

edges.label: Read-only research queries
edges.details: Selected backtest panels query research Supabase views directly from the browser.

verification.evidence: script.js fetchResearchView queries the research Supabase endpoint.

edges.label: Checked-in checker artifacts
edges.details: Checker JSON files drive multiple research panels and deterministic validations.

verification.evidence: script.js and Playwright smoke both consume the checked-in checker artifacts.

edges.label: ADR/L2L research artifact
edges.details: The L2L 1H Sequence Research tab reads the checked-in ADR artifact.

verification.evidence: script.js and smoke tests both consume data/adr-reach-research.json.

edges.label: Factor Edge Lab artifact
edges.details: The Factor Edge Lab tab reads the checked-in factor artifact.

verification.evidence: script.js and smoke tests both consume data/factor-edge-lab.json.

edges.label: Shadow backtest artifact
edges.details: The Shadow Logic Backtest tab reads the checked-in Phase 2 artifact.

verification.evidence: script.js and smoke tests both consume data/phase-2-shadow-backtest.json.

edges.label: Webhook trigger
edges.details: The dashboard trigger path uses workflow-control.json rather than a direct browser n8n API key.

verification.evidence: script.js triggerWorkflowRun posts to the configured webhook URL.

edges.label: Execute sub-workflow
edges.details: Eco Events Collector is the first child workflow in the current orchestrator sequence.

verification.evidence: exports/master_orchestrator.json includes the step and sequence.

edges.label: Execute sub-workflow
edges.details: USD Collector runs after Eco Events Collector in the current sequence.

verification.evidence: exports/master_orchestrator.json includes the step and sequence.

edges.label: Execute sub-workflow
edges.details: EUR Collector runs in the current sequence before Layer 1 agent execution.

verification.evidence: exports/master_orchestrator.json includes the step and sequence.

edges.details: Gold Collector runs in the current sequence before Layer 1 agent execution.

edges.details: USD Layer 1 Agent runs after collectors in the current sequence.

edges.label: Execute sub-workflow
edges.details: Layer 2 Trade Selection Agent is included in the current orchestrator sequence before Dashboard Writer.

verification.evidence: exports/master_orchestrator.json includes Layer 2 Trade Selection Agent.

edges.label: Execute sub-workflow

verification.evidence: exports/master_orchestrator.json includes Dashboard Writer after Layer 2.

edges.label: Build final step summary
edges.details: After child workflows run, the orchestrator builds the final published status payload.

verification.evidence: exports/master_orchestrator.json contains the status-building JS node.

edges.label: Publish status artifact
edges.details: The status builder writes data/workflow-status.json back into GitHub.

verification.evidence: exports/master_orchestrator.json writes data/workflow-status.json with a GitHub node.

edges.label: Writes deduped event rows
edges.details: Eco Events Collector writes deduped rows into Supabase economic_events.

verification.evidence: exports/eco_events_collector.json and docs identify economic_events as the target.

edges.label: Writes USD market context
edges.details: USD Collector contributes runtime snapshot context for downstream Layer 1 use.

verification.evidence: Handoff docs assign collectors to market_snapshots as the runtime snapshot layer.

edges.details: EUR Collector contributes runtime snapshot context for downstream Layer 1 use.

edges.details: BTC Collector contributes runtime snapshot context for downstream Layer 1 use.

verification.evidence: Handoff docs assign collectors to market_snapshots as the runtime snapshot layer.

edges.details: Layer 1 agents consume only their own usable snapshot context.

verification.evidence: Handoff and runtime architecture docs identify agent_outputs as the Layer 1 output store.

edges.details: EUR Layer 1 Agent writes raw directional output into agent_outputs.

edges.details: Gold Layer 1 Agent writes raw directional output into agent_outputs.

edges.details: BTC Layer 1 Agent writes raw directional output into agent_outputs.

edges.label: Reads Layer 1 outputs
edges.details: The current Layer 2 export reads agent_outputs as its verified upstream source.

verification.evidence: exports/layer2_trade_selection_agent.json queries agent_outputs.

edges.label: Event adjustment input
edges.details: Repository prose describes Layer 2 as event-adjusted, but the current verified export evidence confirms agent_outputs reads more clearly than a direct economic_events read path.

verification.evidence: README.md describes Layer 2 as event-adjusted, while the current export evidence centers on agent_outputs.
notes: Retained explicitly as unverified instead of promoted into a verified runtime dependency.

edges.label: Publishes Layer 2 artifact
edges.details: The current verified Layer 2 export writes data/layer2.json back into GitHub.

verification.evidence: exports/layer2_trade_selection_agent.json writes data/layer2.json with a GitHub node.
notes: Exact commit sequencing relative to other orchestrator publications remains unverified.

edges.label: Reads Layer 1 outputs
edges.details: Dashboard Writer reads agent_outputs and builds the published Layer 1 dashboard artifact.

verification.evidence: exports/dashboard_writer.json queries agent_outputs.

edges.label: Publishes Layer 1 artifact
edges.details: The verified Dashboard Writer export writes data/layer1.json back into GitHub.

verification.evidence: exports/dashboard_writer.json writes data/layer1.json with a GitHub node.
notes: Exact commit sequencing relative to other orchestrator publications remains unverified.

edges.label: Defines replay baseline
edges.details: Replay and snapshot generation stay downstream of the checked-in logic and documentation baseline.

verification.evidence: Research docs and scripts treat the repository as the replay baseline.

edges.label: Feeds historical replay inputs
edges.details: Historical snapshots are built before replay reconstructs production-style calls.

verification.evidence: Handoff sequence and builder/replay scripts define this research order.

edges.label: Feeds evaluated predictions
edges.details: Replay output is judged against realized outcomes before checker generation.

verification.evidence: Research docs and tests describe replay before evaluation.

edges.label: Builds canonical checker artifacts
edges.details: Checker artifacts are downstream reproducibility evidence built after evaluation.

verification.evidence: Current checked-in checker artifacts and docs describe the evaluation-to-checker path.

edges.label: Feeds derived research summaries
edges.details: The dashboard’s research views are downstream analytical surfaces built on canonical research outputs.

verification.evidence: Handoff and script.js align on downstream research summaries, though full view lineage is not fully enumerated in one artifact.
notes: Complete column-level Supabase research lineage remains explicitly unverified.

edges.label: Builds factor review artifact
edges.details: Factor Edge Lab is built downstream from checked-in checker evidence.

verification.evidence: Current changelog, tests, and dashboard artifact usage all align on checker-driven Factor Edge Lab generation.

edges.label: Builds shadow comparison artifact
edges.details: Phase 2 Shadow Backtest reuses stored checker evidence rather than changing production logic.

verification.evidence: Current changelog and tests describe Phase 2 as checker-driven and downstream-only.

edges.label: Supplies weighting evidence
edges.details: Phase 2 Shadow Backtest reuses checked-in Factor Edge evidence for conservative shadow reweighting.

verification.evidence: Current changelog and backtester docs describe Phase 2 as using checked-in Factor Edge evidence.

edges.label: Feeds Phase 3 validation
edges.details: Phase 3 validation work consumes frozen research outputs rather than mutating production logic.

verification.evidence: Phase 3 scripts and reports exist, but not every publication path is unified into a single artifact.

edges.label: Supplies checker-side call context
edges.details: ADR/L2L research uses canonical checker outputs as one of its downstream reference inputs.

verification.evidence: Current docs describe checker-backed sequence research for Layer 1 and Layer 2.

edges.label: Supplies sequence-aware OHLC
edges.details: L2L 1H Sequence Research requires repo-local candle coverage and keeps unsupported assets unavailable.

verification.evidence: Current importer scripts, docs, and artifact behavior all enforce this requirement.

views.label: Overview Map
views.description: High-level production and research map, including the top-level browser, runtime, publication, and research surfaces.

views.label: Production Flow
views.description: Current production path from browser trigger through orchestration, runtime storage, publication, and dashboard rendering.

views.label: Layer 1
views.description: Collector-to-snapshot-to-sealed-agent flow for the five production Layer 1 assets.

views.label: Layer 2
views.description: Current downstream Layer 2 pair-selection path and the explicitly uncertain event-adjustment dependency.

views.label: n8n Execution
views.description: Dashboard-triggered webhook control path and the verified child-workflow execution chain.

views.label: Artifact Publication
views.description: Verified checked-in publication targets and the deliberately unverified areas around exact commit sequencing and extra writers.

views.label: Historical Replay and Checker
views.description: Downstream historical snapshot, replay, evaluation, and checker chain.

views.label: Factor Edge Lab
views.description: Checker-driven factor review artifact and its read-only dashboard publication path.

views.label: Phase 2 Shadow Backtest
views.description: Checker- and Factor Edge-driven shadow comparison artifact that stays downstream-only.

views.label: Phase 3 Validation
views.description: Phase 3 validation work consuming frozen research outputs while keeping production logic unchanged.

views.label: ADR / L2L Research
views.description: Sequence-aware ADR/L2L research path using checker context plus repo-local candle sources.

views.label: Research Flow
views.description: Cross-module downstream research path from repo baseline through checker-driven artifacts and read-only dashboard publication.

views.label: Failure and Status Paths
views.description: Published workflow health path and the current boundary between verified step reporting and unverified internal fan-out.
